title: trichochloa gracilis
intro: Trichochloa gracilis is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of millet or wild rice. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Trichochloa gracilis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Trichochloa gracilis may be made into teas, infusions, or supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
